diagrams.title: Ricart-Agrawala Algorithm Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the message exchange pattern in Ricart-Agrawala: process P sends REQUEST to all others, receives REPLY from all, enters CS, then releases CS and sends REPLY to deferred requests
diagrams.purpose: Understanding message complexity and synchronization flow

diagrams.title: Token Ring Organization
diagrams.description: Logical ring arrangement of N processes with a token (diamond) circulating clockwise
elements: N process circles arranged in ring
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing token-based mutual exclusion and potential token loss scenarios

diagrams.title: Lamport Logical Clock Timeline
diagrams.description: Timeline showing events (local, send, receive) with their logical timestamps illustrating causal ordering
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how logical clocks establish event ordering

diagrams.title: Maekawa Quorum Overlap
diagrams.description: Venn diagram showing overlapping quorums (request sets) for different processes, demonstrating the intersection property
elements: Process labels at center of each
diagrams.purpose: Understanding quorum-based voting and why intersection ensures mutual exclusion

visuals.title: Distributed Mutual Exclusion
visuals.description: Visual diagram for distributed mutual exclusion
